scripts.version: node scripts/update-version.js && git add gemini-extension.json tool_code.py package.json
scripts.save: git add . && git commit -m "v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git push
scripts.push:release: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v' + v + ' --generate-notes', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.deploy: npm run save && npm run lint && npm version patch && npm run push:tags && npm run push:release && npm run cleanup-releases && npm run update
